nav.localNote: Local app, your data on your PC.

books.librarySubtitle: Import manuscripts and manage each book's profile.
books.emptyDescription: Upload a Markdown manuscript: the model prepares a profile with synopsis, genres and tone, ready to generate posts.
books.sampleFailed: Failed to import the sample book.

import.title: Upload a book
import.description: Import a Markdown manuscript. The model derives a profile with synopsis, genres and tone.
import.dropHint: Drop the .md file here or click to choose it
import.longBookNote: For large books the analysis may take a few minutes. You can wait here (we'll notify you when it's ready) or close it: it continues in the background and the profile will appear on its own.

book.notFoundDescription: The requested book no longer exists.
book.analysisRunningNote: Book analysis in progress. It may take a few minutes: the profile and characters will update automatically when it's done.
book.confirmDeleteDescription: The profile, links, images and related drafts will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
book.confirmReanalyzeBody: Re-analyze the book with AI to (re)extract the profile and characters. It may take a few minutes.

profile.title: Book profile
profile.description: Generated by the model on import.
profile.notAvailable: Profile not yet available for this book.
profile.antiSpoilerNote: The anti-spoiler policy is active: the model does not reveal protected key events when generating posts.

baseHashtags.title: Base hashtags
baseHashtags.description: Applied to every post for this book, in addition to the specific ones generated each time.

directives.title: Visual directives
directives.description: A set of rules and instructions that guide image generation for this book.
directives.intro: Choose which sets of visual rules apply to this book (e.g. sea/windsurf, red door). They only activate in relevant scenes.
directives.freeTextPlaceholder: E.g. recurring details, palette, specific locations for this book…

links.title: Links
links.description: Book and author links: they can appear in posts according to the usage rule.

media.title: Images
media.description: Covers or illustrations to use in posts.
media.batchChangesPlaceholder: Optional. E.g. "more light", "remove people". Leave empty to regenerate each with its saved prompt.

lightbox.changesPlaceholder: Write what to change, e.g. "remove the person", "sunset sky", "brighter red door". The AI updates the prompt while keeping the style.
lightbox.verifyNote: After generation, a model checks the image and, if it finds issues, regenerates it once.
lightbox.flashbackSettingPlaceholder: Setting/era: e.g. "beach by the sea, youth"
lightbox.regenerateFromChapterTitle: Rebuilds the prompt from the chapter text applying current rules (physics, windsurf, etc.)
lightbox.regenerateFromChapterHint: Rebuilds the prompt from the chapter text applying current rules (physics, windsurf, etc.).
lightbox.alreadyRegenerating: A regeneration is already in progress for this image.
lightbox.engineUnavailable: The generation engine is not available in this environment.
lightbox.noPromptAvailable: Image cannot be regenerated: no prompt available.

sceneGen.heading: Generate scene images (AI)
sceneGen.unavailable: AI generation not available in this environment.
sceneGen.charactersFeatureNote: Images featuring <1>{{names}}</1> will be generated in the chapters where they appear (if you also select chapters, those take priority).
sceneGen.flashbackSettingPlaceholder: E.g. "beach by the sea, summer, youth"
sceneGen.flashbackNote: The characters present will be made younger (same identity: face, hair, eyes) and dressed for the indicated era/place, ignoring their canonical present-day clothing.
sceneGen.footerNote: Select chapters and choose how many images to make <1>per chapter</1>; with no selection it's "Auto" (varied chapters). You can <3>queue</3> multiple requests (e.g. first in 9:16, then change format to 1:1 and add again): the queue runs in sequence without stopping until you press <5>Cancel</5>. Generation is slow (a few minutes per image) and runs locally: the server must stay on.
sceneGen.engineUnavailable: The generation engine is not available in this environment.

pages.title: Linked pages
pages.description: Choose which pages this book can be published to.
pages.noPages: No connected pages. Go to the Connection section to add some.

chapters.emptyDescription: Press "Regenerate analysis" to extract characters from the text with AI, or add one manually.
chapters.noChaptersDescription: This book has no chapters extracted from the text yet.

scene.emptyHint: No visual sheet for this chapter. It is used to generate more consistent images (environment, objects, characters present).
scene.secondaryObjectsPlaceholder: e.g. deck chairs, cup of coffee
scene.physicsRulesPlaceholder:
Constraints the image must respect, one per line. E.g.:
the windsurf sail is on the opposite side to the wind
the rider's hands are on the boom, feet in the straps
the wave forms offshore, not at the shoreline
scene.physicsRulesNote: These are added to the universal base rules. On saving, the sheet becomes "edited manually"; "Regenerate sheet" re-extracts them with AI.

characters.title: Characters
characters.noDetails: No details. Use Edit to add some.
characters.confirmDeleteBody: You are about to delete "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.
characters.sourceAiTooltip: Extracted automatically by the AI during book analysis.
characters.signatureOutfitHint: An accessory/garment the character wears in EVERY scene, on top of any outfit. Leave empty if none.

visualBible.title: Analysis / Visual bible
visualBible.buildTooltip: Build or update the book's visual bible

visualProps.title: Objects & world
visualProps.description: Recurring objects/vehicles kept always the same, and the country's driving side.

visualExtras.title: Minor characters
visualExtras.description: Incidental figures (not in the cast) with a fixed look for the scenes where they appear.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Post status for each connected page.
dashboard.noPagesDescription: Connect a page to see the status of its posts.
dashboard.postsDescription: Drafts and published posts for this page.
dashboard.noPostsDescription: Generate a week from the Planner to populate this page.
dashboard.insightsDescription: Aggregated summary of reach metrics for all pages (period: today).
dashboard.noPagesInsightsDescription: Connect a page to see the insights summary.
dashboard.bestHoursDescription: Recommended time slots to maximize engagement on Facebook.
dashboard.bestHoursNote: Heuristic based on Facebook averages; your data may vary.
dashboard.headerDescription: Overview of your connected pages: metrics, posts and activity.
dashboard.selectPageDescription: The active page drives Posts and Usage stats.
dashboard.postsIgDescription: Scheduled and published posts on Instagram.
dashboard.noPostsFbDescription: Generate a week from the Planner to populate this page.
dashboard.noPostsIgDescription: Instagram posts come from Reels/Stories scheduled in the Planner.
dashboard.selectPageForPosts: Select a page to see its posts.
dashboard.selectPageForUsage: Select a page to see its usage stats.
dashboard.noIgPages: No page with a linked Instagram account.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Scheduled posts by month and week.

dashboard.removeFromViewConfirm: Hide this published post from the dashboard?
dashboard.removeFromViewNote: The post stays published on Facebook/Instagram: it is only hidden from this list, not deleted.
dashboard.removeFromViewFailed: Could not remove the post from view

planner.publishConfirmDescription: Real and immediate publishing on Facebook.
planner.publishConfirmBody: You are about to REALLY publish on Facebook, on the page "{{pageName}}". Real and immediate action.
planner.quotasDescription: Set how many publications you want in the chosen period: the engine automatically decides days, times and formats.
planner.scheduleAllBody: You are about to SCHEDULE the publishing of all drafts for the page "{{pageName}}", at the generated dates and times. <1>Posts (text/photo)</1> are scheduled <3>directly on Facebook</3> (Facebook publishes them, even with the app off). <5>Reels</5> and <7>stories</7> are published by an <9>internal job</9> at their time (Facebook cannot schedule them).
planner.scheduleAllWarning: ⚠️ Only for <1>reels and stories</1>: the app/server must stay running at their time, otherwise they won't go out. Facebook posts go out anyway.
planner.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
planner.selectPageAndBook: Select a page and a book.
planner.endDateBeforeStart: The end date cannot be before the start date.
planner.planDescription: Choose a page and a book, set the quotas, then generate the drafts.
planner.noPagesPlanDescription: Connect at least one page to plan posts.
planner.slotsDescription: When it's ok to publish. The engine picks times within these windows (if empty, uses defaults).
planner.generateDescription: Build the schedule: the engine decides days, times and formats and avoids duplicates.
planner.alreadyRunning: A generation is already in progress for this page.
planner.noDraftsCreatedDescription: Set the quotas or check the book's associations.
planner.noDraftsWithPage: Set the quotas, choose the period and press Generate.
planner.noDraftsWithoutPage: Select a page and a book, set the quotas and press Generate.

programmati.confirmPublishNow: Publish this content on Facebook now? Real and immediate action.
programmati.confirmRemove: Remove this content from the queue? This action cannot be undone.
programmati.queueDescription: Reels and stories the server will publish automatically at the scheduled time.
programmati.noContentDescription: No content in the internal job queue.
programmati.title: Scheduled
programmati.description: Content in the internal publishing job queue (reels and stories).
programmati.noPagesDescription: Connect at least one Facebook page to see scheduled content.
programmati.serverWarning: This content (reels/stories) is published by the internal job at the scheduled time: the server must stay on.
programmati.publishConfirmDescription: Real and immediate publication on Facebook.
programmati.publishConfirmBody: You are about to REALLY publish on Facebook, on page «{{pageName}}». Real and immediate action.
programmati.removeConfirmDescription: The content will be deleted and will no longer be published.
programmati.removeConfirmBody: Do you want to remove this content from the queue? This action cannot be undone.

insights.noTrendDescription: Follower trend data is not available yet.
insights.historyEmpty: History fills up over time. Keep using the app to see metric trends.
insights.demographicsEmpty: Demographic data not available for this page.
insights.noMetricsDescription: Insight data is not available yet for this page.
insights.followerTrendDescription: New vs lost in the last days
insights.noPostDescription: There are no posts to show for this page.
insights.historyDescription: Reach and follower trend in saved data
insights.demographicsDescription: Distribution by country, city and age-gender bracket
insights.comparisonDescription: Main KPIs side by side for a quick comparison
insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Reach and engagement metrics for each connected Facebook page.
insights.noPagesDescription: Connect at least one Facebook page to view insights.

pageMgmt.deleteCommentBody: You are about to permanently delete this comment from the real public page. Confirm?
pageMgmt.editPostBody: The post text will be updated immediately on the public Facebook page. Confirm?
pageMgmt.unpinBody: The post will no longer be pinned at the top of the public page. Confirm?
pageMgmt.pinBody: The post will be pinned at the top of the public page. Confirm?
pageMgmt.deletePostBody: You are about to permanently delete this post from the real public page "{{pageName}}". This operation cannot be undone.
pageMgmt.postsDescription: Edit, pin or delete posts; expand to manage comments.
pageMgmt.noPostsDescription: There are no posts for this page yet. Create the first one to get started.
pageMgmt.scheduledDescription: Content already scheduled on the Facebook page (on Facebook's side, not local drafts). A scheduled Reel may appear as "video" until it is published.
pageMgmt.noScheduledDescription: There are no scheduled posts on this Facebook page.
pageMgmt.previewPlaceholder: The post text will appear here…
pageMgmt.scheduleHint: If you set a future date/time, the post will be scheduled natively by Facebook. Leave empty to publish immediately.
pageMgmt.schedulePast: The scheduling date is in the past. Choose a future date/time or leave the field empty to publish immediately.
pageMgmt.publishRealWarning: This action really publishes on the public Facebook page "{{pageName}}", visible to everyone.
pageMgmt.confirmPublishDescription: Publishing on a real public page
pageMgmt.confirmScheduleBody: You are about to publish on the real public page "{{pageName}}". The post will be published automatically by Facebook at the scheduled date. Confirm?
pageMgmt.confirmPublishBody: You are about to publish on the real public page "{{pageName}}". The post will be immediately visible to everyone on Facebook. Confirm?
pageMgmt.settingsDescription: Edit the page's description, contacts, cover and publication status.
pageMgmt.title: Page management
pageMgmt.description: Manage posts, comments, fields and native publishing of your Facebook pages.
pageMgmt.noPagesDescription: Connect at least one Facebook page to manage it.

connection.tokenRequired: Paste the System User token first.
connection.noPagesFound: No pages found for this token.
connection.saved: Saved {{count}} pages. The tokens stay in the keyring.
connection.connectDescription: Paste a System User token. Managed pages are read from Facebook and the tokens stay only in the system keyring.
connection.tokenHint: The token is never saved in the database, nor shown in the logs.
connection.connectedDescription: The pages currently linked to BookSocial Studio.
connection.noPagesDescription: Connect a System User token above to start publishing your books.
connection.disconnectDescription: The tokens will be removed from the keyring. You can reconnect at any time.
connection.disconnectBody: This action unlinks every page from BookSocial Studio. Books and drafts remain saved.

ai.title: AI providers
ai.description: Choose the providers for text and image generation and configure API keys.
ai.keyHint: Leave empty to keep the existing key unchanged.
ai.cliLoginNote: Uses the CLI subscription/login (no key required).
ai.sharedOpenaiKey: Uses the same OpenAI key configured above.
ai.sharedGoogleKey: Uses the same Google key configured above.
ai.localImageNote: Uses the local engine (sd-cli). Configured via environment variables.
ai.modelsEmpty: No models found: enter the name manually.
ai.cliAuthNote: Authentication via the {{tool}} CLI: install it and sign in with your subscription; the app does not require any token.
ai.cliLoginGuide: Complete the login in the browser/terminal, then press Verify.
ai.cliModelPlaceholder: CLI model name (leave empty for the default)
ai.fallbackNote: Fallback provider used when the primary runs out of quota or hits rate limits.
ai.addModelPlaceholder: Name of the model to add
ai.agentImageNote: Generates images via the agentic CLI (no key: uses the CLI login).
ai.extraDescription: Additional guidance appended to every text and image prompt.
ai.extraNote: This text is added at the end of every prompt, without replacing the core rules (no spoilers, language, safety). It applies to all books; for book-specific guidance use its page (Visual → Art direction).
ai.extraTextHint: E.g. tone, signature, recurring call-to-action, topics to avoid.
ai.extraImageHint: E.g. palette, recurring style, elements to include or avoid.

imageMode.title: Content images
imageMode.description: Where images come from when generating schedules.
imageMode.libraryDescription: Use only the book's uploaded images.
imageMode.directDescription: Generates the scene illustration when the schedule is created, with a fallback to uploaded images.
imageMode.slowNote: The "Direct generation (AI)" mode makes schedule generation much slower, because each image is created locally.

qa.title: Image quality check
qa.description: After each generated image, a model checks it and flags issues (text, anatomy, etc.). It can be turned off to skip the check.
qa.enabledNote: Every generated image is analyzed. Issues are flagged in the book profile.
qa.disabledNote: No quality check will be run on generated images.

visualGen.modalDescription: Create an image or a reel from the draft. It stays attached here, no publishing.
visualGen.musicHint: Reel soundtrack. "None" generates a silent reel.
visualGen.bookImagesHint: If the book has uploaded images, they will be used as background/slideshow; otherwise text only.

music.deleteTrackBody: You are about to permanently delete the track "{{title}}" from the music library. Confirm?
music.selectFile: Select an audio file to upload.
music.title: Book music
music.description: Tracks used in this book's reels and stories.
music.emptyDescription: Upload an audio file to use as music in this book's reels and stories.

balloon.emptyHint: Generate an image above, or upload an image to add comics.
balloon.instructions: Drag the balloon to move it, the square to resize it, the dot for the tail. Then "Download PNG".

story.published: Story published. It will stay visible for 24 hours.
story.confirmBody: You are about to publish this draft's 9:16 visual as a Story on the public Facebook page. The Story will be visible to everyone and will automatically disappear after 24 hours. Confirm?

pageSettings.uploadError: An error occurred during the upload.
pageSettings.changeCoverDescription: You are about to change the cover of the public page "{{pageName}}".
pageSettings.changeCoverBody: The new cover will be applied immediately to the public Facebook page. Confirm?
pageSettings.pagePublicNote: The page is visible to the public on Facebook.
pageSettings.pageHiddenNote: The page is hidden: the public cannot see it.
pageSettings.visibilityWarning: Turning off visibility hides the page from the public on Facebook. This change takes effect immediately on the real page.
pageSettings.saveError: An error occurred during the save.
pageSettings.aboutPlaceholder: A line that describes the page…
pageSettings.emailsHint: Email addresses shown on the page.
pageSettings.visibilityHint: This setting controls whether your page is visible to the public on Facebook.
pageSettings.confirmChangesDescription: You are about to edit the real public page "{{pageName}}".
pageSettings.confirmChangesBody: The changes will be applied immediately to the public Facebook page. Confirm?
pageSettings.loadFailed: Could not load the page details.

usageStats.title: Usage statistics
usageStats.description: How generated content is distributed by format, text and aspect ratio.
usageStats.emptyDescription: Generate a few drafts from the Planner to see the format distribution here.

instagram.deleteCommentConfirm: Permanently delete this comment from the real Instagram account?
instagram.postsDesc: Media published on the Instagram account; expand a media to manage its comments.
instagram.noMediaDesc: There are no published items on this Instagram account yet.
instagram.scheduledDesc: Twin Instagram jobs (Reel/Story) pending publication, linked to scheduled Facebook posts.
instagram.noJobsDesc: Enable “Publish also on Instagram” on a scheduled Reel or Story to create one.
instagram.accountDesc: Profile info of the linked Instagram Business account.
instagram.accountUnavailableDesc: Could not read the Instagram account information.
instagram.insightsDesc: Daily metrics for the Instagram account. Some metrics may not be available on all accounts.
instagram.metricsAccountDesc: Some metrics may not be available on all Instagram accounts.
instagram.noMetrics: No metrics available for this account.
instagram.addFailedReelStory: Only video Reels and Stories can go to Instagram.
instagram.alsoPublishTooltip: Publish this Reel/Story on Instagram at the same time.
instagram.alsoPublishedTooltip: This content will also be published on Instagram at the same time.

sea_windsurf.label: Sea / windsurf / surf
sea_windsurf.description: Rules for beach, sea, waves and windsurf/surf/kite gear: sail geometry, rider posture, wave placement. Active only in chapters that actually show these things.

red_door.label: Red door / symbolic threshold
red_door.description: The recurring red door with a FIXED, always-identical design (a smooth Ferrari-red slab, one white wooden handle, no panels or keyhole, standing alone in a clearing). Active only in chapters where the door is actually present.

spiritual_practice.label: Spiritual practice (meditation/reiki/yoga)
spiritual_practice.description: Truthful rendering of meditation, reiki, yoga, prayer. Active only in chapters where the practice actually takes place.

film_set.label: Film set
film_set.description: Rendering of a real film set (cameras, lights, crew, clapperboard). Active only in chapters set on a film set.

vehicles_places.label: Vehicles and places (car/hospital/home)
vehicles_places.description: Plausible rendering of cars on lakeside/mountain roads, hospital rooms, quiet domestic scenes. Active only in relevant chapters.

bookDetail.extraInstructionsDesc: Additional guidance appended to text and image prompts for this book only.
bookDetail.extraInstructionsHint: Added on top of the global instructions and the base prompt, without replacing them.
bookDetail.extraTextPlaceholder: Add guidance for this book's posts…
bookDetail.extraImagePlaceholder: Add guidance for this book's images…
bookDetail.keyMomentPlaceholder: The visual happening of the chapter (non-spoiler): who does what, where
bookDetail.characterChaptersHint: Select the chapters where the character appears: it determines the characters available when regenerating images.
bookDetail.sceneGenHelp: Select the chapters and choose how many images to create for each chapter; without selection it is «Auto» (various chapters). You can queue multiple requests (e.g., first in 9:16, then change format to 1:1 and add again): the queue runs in sequence without stopping until you press Cancel. Generation is slow (a few minutes per image) and runs locally: the server must stay on.
